context: forall(j in jobs, m in machines)(end[j,m] = start[j,m] + duration[j,m])
forall(j in jobs, i in 1..num_ops-1)(start[j,op_order[j,i+1]] >= end[j,op_order[j,i]])
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..horizon: start[j,m]","var 1..horizon: end[j,m]"],"constraints":["forall(j in jobs, m in machines)(end[j,m] = start[j,m] + duration[j,m])","forall(j in jobs, i in 1..num_ops-1)(start[j,op_order[j,i+1]] >= end[j,op_order[j,i]])","forall(m in machines)(disjunctive(start[..,m], duration[..,m]))","makespan = max(j in jobs)(end[j,last_op[j]])"]}

context: forall(j in 1..num_jobs, m in 1..num_machines-1)(start[j,m+1] >= start[j,m] + proc[j,m])
forall(j in 1..num_jobs-1, m in 1..num_machines)(start[j+1,m] >= start[j,m] + proc[j,m])
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 0..horizon: start[1..num_jobs, 1..num_machines]"],"constraints":["forall(j in 1..num_jobs, m in 1..num_machines-1)(start[j,m+1] >= start[j,m] + proc[j,m])","forall(j in 1..num_jobs-1, m in 1..num_machines)(start[j+1,m] >= start[j,m] + proc[j,m])"]}

context: forall(d in 1..num_days, s in 1..num_shifts)(sum(n in 1..num_nurses)(roster[n,d] = s) >= demand[d,s])
forall(n in 1..num_nurses, d in 1..num_days-1)(not (roster[n,d] = night /\ roster[n,d+1] = morning))
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var shifts: roster[1..num_nurses, 1..num_days]"],"constraints":["forall(d in 1..num_days, s in 1..num_shifts)(sum(n in 1..num_nurses)(roster[n,d] = s) >= demand[d,s])","forall(n in 1..num_nurses, d in 1..num_days-1)(not (roster[n,d] = night /\\ roster[n,d+1] = morning))","forall(n in 1..num_nurses)(sum(d in 1..num_days)(roster[n,d] != off) <= max_shifts)"]}

{"variables":["var 1..num_workers: assign[1..num_tasks]"],"constraints":["all_different(assign)","total_cost = sum(t in 1..num_tasks)(cost[t, assign[t]])","forall(w in 1..num_workers)(sum(t in 1..num_tasks)(assign[t] = w) <= capacity[w])"]}

context: forall(r in resources, t in 0..horizon)(sum(a in activities where start[a] <= t /\ t < end[a])(usage[a,r]) <= capacity[r])
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 0..horizon: start[1..num_activities]","var 0..horizon: end[1..num_activities]"],"constraints":["forall(a in activities)(end[a] = start[a] + duration[a])","forall((a,b) in precedences)(start[b] >= end[a])","forall(r in resources, t in 0..horizon)(sum(a in activities where start[a] <= t /\\ t < end[a])(usage[a,r]) <= capacity[r])","makespan = max(a in activities)(end[a])"]}

context: forall(b in 1..max_bins)(sum(i in 1..num_items where bin[i] = b)(size[i]) <= capacity)
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..max_bins: bin[1..num_items]","var 0..1: used[1..max_bins]"],"constraints":["forall(b in 1..max_bins)(sum(i in 1..num_items where bin[i] = b)(size[i]) <= capacity)","forall(i in 1..num_items)(used[bin[i]] = 1)","num_bins = sum(b in 1..max_bins)(used[b])"]}

{"variables":["var 0..max_copies: cut[1..num_patterns]"],"constraints":["forall(w in 1..num_widths)(sum(p in 1..num_patterns)(pattern[p,w] * cut[p]) >= demand[w])","num_rolls = sum(p in 1..num_patterns)(cut[p])"]}

{"variables":["var 0..num_customers: next[0..num_customers]"],"constraints":["circuit(next)","forall(v in 1..num_vehicles)(load[v] <= vehicle_capacity)","total_distance = sum(i in 0..num_customers)(dist[i, next[i]])"]}

context: tour_length = sum(i in 1..n-1)(dist[order[i], order[i+1]]) + dist[order[n], order[1]]
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..n: order[1..n]"],"constraints":["all_different(order)","tour_length = sum(i in 1..n-1)(dist[order[i], order[i+1]]) + dist[order[n], order[1]]"]}

{"variables":["var 0..1: load[1..num_items]"],"constraints":["sum(i in 1..num_items)(load[i] * weight[i]) <= max_weight","sum(i in 1..num_items)(load[i] * volume[i]) <= max_volume","total_value = sum(i in 1..num_items)(load[i] * value[i])"]}
{"variables":["var 1..n: queens[1..n]"],"constraints":["all_different(queens)","all_different([queens[i] + i | i in 1..n])","all_different([queens[i] - i | i in 1..n])"]}

context: forall(br in 0..2, bc in 0..2)(all_different([grid[br*3+r, bc*3+c] | r in 1..3, c in 1..3]))
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..9: grid[1..9, 1..9]"],"constraints":["forall(r in 1..9)(all_different(grid[r, ..]))","forall(c in 1..9)(all_different(grid[.., c]))","forall(br in 0..2, bc in 0..2)(all_different([grid[br*3+r, bc*3+c] | r in 1..3, c in 1..3]))"]}

{"variables":["var 1..n*n: square[1..n, 1..n]"],"constraints":["all_different(array1d(square))","forall(r in 1..n)(sum(c in 1..n)(square[r,c]) = magic_sum)","forall(c in 1..n)(sum(r in 1..n)(square[r,c]) = magic_sum)","sum(i in 1..n)(square[i,i]) = magic_sum","sum(i in 1..n)(square[i,n+1-i]) = magic_sum"]}
{"variables":["var 1..max_colors: color[1..num_nodes]"],"constraints":["forall((u,v) in edges)(color[u] != color[v])","num_colors = max(color)"]}
{"variables":["var 1..n: square[1..n, 1..n]"],"constraints":["forall(r in 1..n)(all_different(square[r, ..]))","forall(c in 1..n)(all_different(square[.., c]))"]}

context: all_different([marks[j] - marks[i] | i in 1..n, j in i+1..n])
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 0..max_mark: marks[1..n]"],"constraints":["marks[1] = 0","forall(i in 1..n-1)(marks[i] < marks[i+1])","all_different([marks[j] - marks[i] | i in 1..n, j in i+1..n])"]}

context: forall(e in 1..num_elements)(sum(s in 1..num_sets where e in set_content[s])(selected[s]) >= 1)
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 0..1: selected[1..num_sets]"],"constraints":["forall(e in 1..num_elements)(sum(s in 1..num_sets where e in set_content[s])(selected[s]) >= 1)"]}

context: forall(t1 in 1..num_triples, t2 in t1+1..num_triples)(card(triple[t1] intersect triple[t2]) <= 1)
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var set of 1..n: triple[1..num_triples]"],"constraints":["forall(t in 1..num_triples)(card(triple[t]) = 3)","forall(t1 in 1..num_triples, t2 in t1+1..num_triples)(card(triple[t1] intersect triple[t2]) <= 1)"]}
{"variables":["var 0..1: take[1..n]"],"constraints":["sum(i in 1..n)(take[i] * weight[i]) <= capacity","total_value = sum(i in 1..n)(take[i] * value[i])"]}

{"variables":["var 0.0..1.0: allocation[1..num_assets]"],"constraints":["sum(allocation) = 1.0","forall(i in 1..num_assets)(allocation[i] >= min_alloc[i])","expected_return = sum(i in 1..num_assets)(allocation[i] * return_rate[i])","risk = sum(i,j in 1..num_assets)(allocation[i] * allocation[j] * covariance[i,j])"]}

{"variables":["var 0..1: open[1..num_facilities]","var 0..1: assign[1..num_customers, 1..num_facilities]"],"constraints":["forall(c in 1..num_customers)(sum(f in 1..num_facilities)(assign[c,f]) = 1)","forall(c in 1..num_customers, f in 1..num_facilities)(assign[c,f] <= open[f])","total_cost = sum(f)(open[f] * fixed_cost[f]) + sum(c,f)(assign[c,f] * transport_cost[c,f])"]}

{"variables":["var 0.0..max_serving: amount[1..num_foods]"],"constraints":["forall(n in 1..num_nutrients)(sum(f in 1..num_foods)(amount[f] * nutrient_content[f,n]) >= min_nutrient[n])","forall(n in 1..num_nutrients)(sum(f in 1..num_foods)(amount[f] * nutrient_content[f,n]) <= max_nutrient[n])","total_cost = sum(f in 1..num_foods)(amount[f] * price[f])"]}

{"variables":["var 0..1: assign[1..n, 1..n]"],"constraints":["forall(i in 1..n)(sum(j in 1..n)(assign[i,j]) = 1)","forall(j in 1..n)(sum(i in 1..n)(assign[i,j]) = 1)","total_cost = sum(i,j in 1..n)(assign[i,j] * cost[i,j])"]}
{"variables":["var 0..capacity[i,j]: flow[1..n, 1..n]"],"constraints":["forall(v in 2..n-1)(sum(u)(flow[u,v]) = sum(w)(flow[v,w]))","flow_value = sum(v)(flow[1,v])"]}
{"variables":["var 0..capacity[i,j]: flow[1..n, 1..n]"],"constraints":["forall(v in 1..n)(sum(u)(flow[u,v]) - sum(w)(flow[v,w]) = demand[v])","total_cost = sum(i,j)(flow[i,j] * cost[i,j])"]}

context: forall(c1 in courses, c2 in courses where c1 < c2 /\ shared_students[c1,c2] > 0)(schedule[c1] != schedule[c2])
forall(r in rooms, s in slots)(sum(c in courses where schedule[c] = s /\ room[c] = r)(1) <= 1)
forall(t in teachers)(alldifferent([schedule[c] | c in courses where teacher[c] = t]))
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..num_slots: schedule[1..num_courses]"],"constraints":["forall(c in courses)(schedule[c] in available[c])","forall(c1 in courses, c2 in courses where c1 < c2 /\\ shared_students[c1,c2] > 0)(schedule[c1] != schedule[c2])","forall(r in rooms, s in slots)(sum(c in courses where schedule[c] = s /\\ room[c] = r)(1) <= 1)","forall(t in teachers)(alldifferent([schedule[c] | c in courses where teacher[c] = t]))"]}

context: forall(e1,e2 in exams where conflict[e1,e2])(exam_slot[e1] != exam_slot[e2])
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..max_slots: exam_slot[1..num_exams]","var 0..1: slot_used[1..max_slots]"],"constraints":["forall(e1,e2 in exams where conflict[e1,e2])(exam_slot[e1] != exam_slot[e2])","forall(s in 1..max_slots)(slot_used[s] = (exists(e in exams)(exam_slot[e] = s)))","num_slots_used = sum(s in 1..max_slots)(slot_used[s])"]}

context: forall(t in teams)(sum(m in matches)(home[m] = t \/ away[m] = t) = num_rounds)
forall(r in rounds)(alldifferent([home[m] | m in matches where round[m] = r] ++ [away[m] | m in matches where round[m] = r]))
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..num_rounds: round[1..num_matches]","var teams: home[1..num_matches]","var teams: away[1..num_matches]"],"constraints":["forall(m in matches)(home[m] != away[m])","forall(t in teams)(sum(m in matches)(home[m] = t \\/ away[m] = t) = num_rounds)","forall(r in rounds)(alldifferent([home[m] | m in matches where round[m] = r] ++ [away[m] | m in matches where round[m] = r]))"]}

context: forall(f in flights)(sum(c in crew)(assign[c,f]) >= min_crew[f])
forall(c in crew)(sum(f in flights)(assign[c,f] * duration[f]) <= max_hours)
total_crew_cost = sum(c in crew, f in flights)(assign[c,f] * cost[c,f])
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 0..1: assign[1..num_crew, 1..num_flights]"],"constraints":["forall(f in flights)(sum(c in crew)(assign[c,f]) >= min_crew[f])","forall(c in crew)(sum(f in flights)(assign[c,f] * duration[f]) <= max_hours)","total_crew_cost = sum(c in crew, f in flights)(assign[c,f] * cost[c,f])"]}

context: max_distance = max(p1,p2 in people where collaborate[p1,p2])(distance[assign[p1], assign[p2]])
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..num_rooms: assign[1..num_people]"],"constraints":["alldifferent(assign)","forall(p in people)(capacity[assign[p]] >= needs[p])","max_distance = max(p1,p2 in people where collaborate[p1,p2])(distance[assign[p1], assign[p2]])"]}

context: forall(s in sessions, t in tracks)(sum(k in talks where talk_session[k] = s /\ talk_track[k] = t)(1) <= 1)
forall(k1,k2 in talks where same_speaker[k1,k2])(talk_session[k1] != talk_session[k2])
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..num_sessions: talk_session[1..num_talks]","var 1..num_tracks: talk_track[1..num_talks]"],"constraints":["forall(s in sessions, t in tracks)(sum(k in talks where talk_session[k] = s /\\ talk_track[k] = t)(1) <= 1)","forall(k1,k2 in talks where same_speaker[k1,k2])(talk_session[k1] != talk_session[k2])","forall(k in talks)(talk_track[k] in preferred_tracks[k])"]}

context: forall(v in 2..n-1)(sum(e in in_edges[v])(use_edge[e]) = sum(e in out_edges[v])(use_edge[e]))
sum(e in out_edges[source])(use_edge[e]) - sum(e in in_edges[source])(use_edge[e]) = 1
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 0..1: use_edge[1..num_edges]"],"constraints":["forall(v in 2..n-1)(sum(e in in_edges[v])(use_edge[e]) = sum(e in out_edges[v])(use_edge[e]))","sum(e in out_edges[source])(use_edge[e]) - sum(e in in_edges[source])(use_edge[e]) = 1","path_cost = sum(e in edges)(use_edge[e] * weight[e])"]}

context: forall(s in servers)(sum(t in tasks where assign[t] = s)(demand[t]) <= server_capacity[s])
max_load = max(s in servers)(sum(t in tasks where assign[t] = s)(demand[t]))
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..num_servers: assign[1..num_tasks]"],"constraints":["forall(s in servers)(sum(t in tasks where assign[t] = s)(demand[t]) <= server_capacity[s])","max_load = max(s in servers)(sum(t in tasks where assign[t] = s)(demand[t]))"]}

context: forall(e in edges, p1,p2 in paths where p1 < p2 /\ uses_edge[p1,e] /\ uses_edge[p2,e])(wavelength[p1] != wavelength[p2])
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..max_wl: wavelength[1..num_paths]"],"constraints":["forall(e in edges, p1,p2 in paths where p1 < p2 /\\ uses_edge[p1,e] /\\ uses_edge[p2,e])(wavelength[p1] != wavelength[p2])","num_wavelengths = max(wavelength)"]}

context: forall(e in edges)(sum(f in flows where uses_edge[f,e])(rate[f]) <= capacity[e])
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 0.0..max_rate: rate[1..num_flows]"],"constraints":["forall(e in edges)(sum(f in flows where uses_edge[f,e])(rate[f]) <= capacity[e])","total_throughput = sum(f in flows)(rate[f])"]}

context: forall(h1,h2 in hosts where must_separate[h1,h2])(vlan[h1] != vlan[h2])
forall(h1,h2 in hosts where must_communicate[h1,h2])(vlan[h1] = vlan[h2])
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..max_vlan: vlan[1..num_hosts]"],"constraints":["forall(h1,h2 in hosts where must_separate[h1,h2])(vlan[h1] != vlan[h2])","forall(h1,h2 in hosts where must_communicate[h1,h2])(vlan[h1] = vlan[h2])","num_vlans = max(vlan)"]}

context: forall(w in warehouses, c in customers)(serve[w,c] <= open_wh[w])
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 0..1: open_wh[1..num_warehouses]","var 0..1: serve[1..num_warehouses, 1..num_customers]"],"constraints":["forall(c in customers)(sum(w in warehouses)(serve[w,c]) = 1)","forall(w in warehouses, c in customers)(serve[w,c] <= open_wh[w])","total_cost = sum(w)(open_wh[w]*fixed_cost[w]) + sum(w,c)(serve[w,c]*transport[w,c])"]}

{"variables":["var 0..num_customers: next[0..num_customers]"],"constraints":["subcircuit(next)","forall(v in vehicles)(cumulative_load[v] <= vehicle_cap)","total_distance = sum(i in 0..num_customers)(dist[i, next[i]])"]}

context: forall(t in periods)(inventory[t] = inventory[t-1] + order[t] - demand[t])
total_ordering = sum(t)(if order[t] > 0 then setup_cost + order[t]*unit_cost else 0 endif)
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 0..max_order: order[1..num_periods]","var 0..max_inv: inventory[1..num_periods]"],"constraints":["forall(t in periods)(inventory[t] = inventory[t-1] + order[t] - demand[t])","forall(t in periods)(inventory[t] >= safety_stock)","total_holding = sum(t)(inventory[t]*hold_cost)","total_ordering = sum(t)(if order[t] > 0 then setup_cost + order[t]*unit_cost else 0 endif)"]}

context: forall(r in retailers)(sum(w in warehouses)(deliver[w,r]) >= demand[r])
forall(w in warehouses)(sum(p in plants)(ship[p,w]) >= sum(r in retailers)(deliver[w,r]))
forall(p in plants)(sum(w in warehouses)(ship[p,w]) <= capacity[p])
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 0..max_ship: ship[1..num_plants, 1..num_warehouses]","var 0..max_ship: deliver[1..num_warehouses, 1..num_retailers]"],"constraints":["forall(r in retailers)(sum(w in warehouses)(deliver[w,r]) >= demand[r])","forall(w in warehouses)(sum(p in plants)(ship[p,w]) >= sum(r in retailers)(deliver[w,r]))","forall(p in plants)(sum(w in warehouses)(ship[p,w]) <= capacity[p])","total_supply_cost = sum(p,w)(ship[p,w]*cost_pw[p,w]) + sum(w,r)(deliver[w,r]*cost_wr[w,r])"]}

context: forall(s in stops)(depart[s] + service[s] + travel[s, next[s]] <= depart[next[s]])
forall(v in vehicles)(sum(s in stops where truck[s] = v)(demand[s]) <= truck_cap)
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 0..max_time: depart[1..num_stops]","var vehicles: truck[1..num_stops]"],"constraints":["forall(s in stops)(depart[s] + service[s] + travel[s, next[s]] <= depart[next[s]])","forall(s in stops)(depart[s] + max_cold_time >= depart[next[s]])","forall(v in vehicles)(sum(s in stops where truck[s] = v)(demand[s]) <= truck_cap)"]}

context: sum(i in 1..len1)(letter[word1[i]] * pow10[len1-i]) + sum(i in 1..len2)(letter[word2[i]] * pow10[len2-i]) = sum(i in 1..len3)(letter[word3[i]] * pow10[len3-i])
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 0..9: letter[1..num_letters]"],"constraints":["alldifferent(letter)","letter[leading1] > 0 /\\ letter[leading2] > 0","sum(i in 1..len1)(letter[word1[i]] * pow10[len1-i]) + sum(i in 1..len2)(letter[word2[i]] * pow10[len2-i]) = sum(i in 1..len3)(letter[word3[i]] * pow10[len3-i])"]}

context: forall(g in groups)(alldifferent([cell[c] | c in group_cells[g]]))
forall(g in groups)(sum(c in group_cells[g])(cell[c]) = clue[g])
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..9: cell[1..num_cells]"],"constraints":["forall(g in groups)(alldifferent([cell[c] | c in group_cells[g]]))","forall(g in groups)(sum(c in group_cells[g])(cell[c]) = clue[g])"]}
{"variables":["var 0..1: grid[1..rows, 1..cols]"],"constraints":["forall(r in 1..rows)(check_runs(grid[r,..], row_clues[r]))","forall(c in 1..cols)(check_runs(grid[..,c], col_clues[c]))"]}

context: forall(g in groups)(cage_constraint(grid, g, op[g], target[g]))
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..n: grid[1..n, 1..n]"],"constraints":["forall(r in 1..n)(alldifferent(grid[r, ..]))","forall(c in 1..n)(alldifferent(grid[.., c]))","forall(g in groups)(cage_constraint(grid, g, op[g], target[g]))"]}

{"variables":["var 1..n: grid[1..n, 1..n]"],"constraints":["forall(r in 1..n)(alldifferent(grid[r, ..]))","forall(c in 1..n)(alldifferent(grid[.., c]))","forall((r1,c1,r2,c2) in inequalities)(grid[r1,c1] < grid[r2,c2])"]}

context: forall(v in 1..n*m-1)(exists(r1,c1,r2,c2 in positions where adjacent(r1,c1,r2,c2))(cell[r1,c1] = v /\ cell[r2,c2] = v+1))
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..n*m: cell[1..n, 1..m]"],"constraints":["alldifferent(array1d(cell))","forall(v in 1..n*m-1)(exists(r1,c1,r2,c2 in positions where adjacent(r1,c1,r2,c2))(cell[r1,c1] = v /\\ cell[r2,c2] = v+1))"]}

context: forall(t in periods)(inventory[t] = inventory[t-1] + produce[t] - demand[t])
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 0..max_prod: produce[1..num_periods]","var 0..1: setup[1..num_periods]"],"constraints":["forall(t in periods)(produce[t] <= big_M * setup[t])","forall(t in periods)(inventory[t] = inventory[t-1] + produce[t] - demand[t])","forall(t in periods)(inventory[t] >= 0)","total_production_cost = sum(t)(setup[t]*setup_cost + produce[t]*prod_cost + inventory[t]*hold_cost)"]}

context: forall(s in stations)(sum(t in tasks where station[t] = s)(proc_time[t]) <= cycle_time)
cycle_time >= max(s in stations)(sum(t in tasks where station[t] = s)(proc_time[t]))
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..num_stations: station[1..num_tasks]"],"constraints":["forall((i,j) in precedences)(station[i] <= station[j])","forall(s in stations)(sum(t in tasks where station[t] = s)(proc_time[t]) <= cycle_time)","cycle_time >= max(s in stations)(sum(t in tasks where station[t] = s)(proc_time[t]))"]}

context: forall(t in periods)(workforce[t] = workforce[t-1] + hire[t] - fire[t])
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 0..max_workers: hire[1..num_periods]","var 0..max_workers: fire[1..num_periods]","var 0..max_workers: workforce[1..num_periods]"],"constraints":["forall(t in periods)(workforce[t] = workforce[t-1] + hire[t] - fire[t])","forall(t in periods)(workforce[t] >= min_demand[t])","total_labor_cost = sum(t)(hire[t]*hire_cost + fire[t]*fire_cost + workforce[t]*wage)"]}

context: forall(m in machines)(sum(t in periods)(maintain[m,t]) >= min_maintenance[m])
forall(t in periods)(sum(m in machines)(maintain[m,t]) <= max_simultaneous)
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 0..1: maintain[1..num_machines, 1..num_periods]"],"constraints":["forall(m in machines)(sum(t in periods)(maintain[m,t]) >= min_maintenance[m])","forall(t in periods)(sum(m in machines)(maintain[m,t]) <= max_simultaneous)","total_downtime = sum(m,t)(maintain[m,t] * downtime[m])"]}

context: forall(p in properties)(sum(i in ingredients)(mix[i] * prop_value[i,p]) >= min_prop[p])
forall(p in properties)(sum(i in ingredients)(mix[i] * prop_value[i,p]) <= max_prop[p])
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 0.0..1.0: mix[1..num_ingredients]"],"constraints":["sum(mix) = 1.0","forall(p in properties)(sum(i in ingredients)(mix[i] * prop_value[i,p]) >= min_prop[p])","forall(p in properties)(sum(i in ingredients)(mix[i] * prop_value[i,p]) <= max_prop[p])","total_yield = sum(i in ingredients)(mix[i] * yield_rate[i])"]}

{"variables":["var 0.0..max_gen: output[1..num_generators]"],"constraints":["sum(g in generators)(output[g]) >= total_demand","forall(g in generators)(output[g] >= min_output[g] \\/ output[g] = 0)","forall(g in generators)(output[g] <= max_output[g])","total_generation_cost = sum(g)(output[g] * cost_per_mw[g])"]}

context: forall(t in periods)(soc[t] = soc[t-1] + charge[t] * efficiency)
forall(t in periods)(soc[t] >= min_soc /\ soc[t] <= max_soc)
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var -max_rate..max_rate: charge[1..num_periods]","var 0.0..capacity: soc[1..num_periods]"],"constraints":["forall(t in periods)(soc[t] = soc[t-1] + charge[t] * efficiency)","forall(t in periods)(soc[t] >= min_soc /\\ soc[t] <= max_soc)","electricity_cost = sum(t)(max(0, demand[t] + charge[t]) * price[t])"]}

context: forall(c in chargers, t in periods)(sum(v in vehicles where assign_charger[v]=c /\ start_charge[v]<=t /\ t<start_charge[v]+duration[v])(1) <= 1)
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..num_chargers: assign_charger[1..num_vehicles]","var 0..horizon: start_charge[1..num_vehicles]"],"constraints":["forall(c in chargers, t in periods)(sum(v in vehicles where assign_charger[v]=c /\\ start_charge[v]<=t /\\ t<start_charge[v]+duration[v])(1) <= 1)","forall(v in vehicles)(start_charge[v] >= arrival[v])","total_wait = sum(v)(start_charge[v] - arrival[v])"]}

context: forall(p1,p2 in positions where p1<p2 /\ adjacent(p1,p2))(place[p1]+place[p2] <= 1)
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 0..1: place[1..num_positions]"],"constraints":["sum(place) <= max_panels","forall(p1,p2 in positions where p1<p2 /\\ adjacent(p1,p2))(place[p1]+place[p2] <= 1)","total_output = sum(p in positions)(place[p] * irradiance[p])"]}

{"variables":["var 0..1: build[1..num_sites]"],"constraints":["sum(s in sites)(build[s] * cost[s]) <= budget","forall(s1,s2 in sites where too_close(s1,s2))(build[s1]+build[s2] <= 1)","annual_energy = sum(s)(build[s] * wind_resource[s] * capacity[s])"]}

context: forall(o in ors)(disjunctive([surgery_start[s] | s where or_assign[s]=o], [duration[s] | s where or_assign[s]=o]))
forall(s in surgeries)(surgery_start[s] + duration[s] <= deadline[s] \/ tardiness[s] >= 0)
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..num_ors: or_assign[1..num_surgeries]","var 0..horizon: surgery_start[1..num_surgeries]"],"constraints":["forall(o in ors)(disjunctive([surgery_start[s] | s where or_assign[s]=o], [duration[s] | s where or_assign[s]=o]))","forall(s in surgeries)(surgery_start[s] + duration[s] <= deadline[s] \\/ tardiness[s] >= 0)","total_tardiness = sum(s)(max(0, surgery_start[s]+duration[s]-deadline[s]))"]}

context: forall(w in wards)(sum(p in patients where bed_ward[p]=w)(1) <= ward_capacity[w])
total_transfer = sum(p)(if bed_ward[p] != preferred_ward[p] then 1 else 0 endif)
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..num_wards: bed_ward[1..num_patients]"],"constraints":["forall(w in wards)(sum(p in patients where bed_ward[p]=w)(1) <= ward_capacity[w])","forall(p in patients)(bed_ward[p] in compatible_wards[p])","total_transfer = sum(p)(if bed_ward[p] != preferred_ward[p] then 1 else 0 endif)"]}

context: forall(z in zones)(sum(a in ambulances where travel_time[base[a],z] <= max_allowed)(1) >= coverage_req[z])
forall(s in stations)(sum(a in ambulances where base[a]=s)(1) <= station_cap[s])
max_response_time = max(z in zones)(min(a in ambulances)(travel_time[base[a],z]))
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..num_stations: base[1..num_ambulances]"],"constraints":["forall(z in zones)(sum(a in ambulances where travel_time[base[a],z] <= max_allowed)(1) >= coverage_req[z])","forall(s in stations)(sum(a in ambulances where base[a]=s)(1) <= station_cap[s])","max_response_time = max(z in zones)(min(a in ambulances)(travel_time[base[a],z]))"]}

context: forall(d in days, s in shifts)(sum(n in nurses where roster[n,d]=s)(1) >= demand[d,s])
forall(n in nurses, d in 1..num_days-1)(not(roster[n,d]=night /\ roster[n,d+1]=morning))
forall(n in nurses)(sum(d in days where roster[n,d]!=off)(1) <= max_shifts_per_nurse)
preference_violations = sum(n,d)(if roster[n,d] != preferred[n,d] then 1 else 0 endif)
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var shifts: roster[1..num_nurses, 1..num_days]"],"constraints":["forall(d in days, s in shifts)(sum(n in nurses where roster[n,d]=s)(1) >= demand[d,s])","forall(n in nurses, d in 1..num_days-1)(not(roster[n,d]=night /\\ roster[n,d+1]=morning))","forall(n in nurses)(sum(d in days where roster[n,d]!=off)(1) <= max_shifts_per_nurse)","preference_violations = sum(n,d)(if roster[n,d] != preferred[n,d] then 1 else 0 endif)"]}

context: forall(t in slots)(sum(m where maintain_slot[m]=t)(1) <= max_simultaneous)
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..num_slots: maintain_slot[1..num_machines]"],"constraints":["forall(t in slots)(sum(m where maintain_slot[m]=t)(1) <= max_simultaneous)","forall(m in machines)(maintain_slot[m] >= earliest_maint[m])","total_downtime = sum(m)(downtime_cost[m])"]}

context: forall(g in groups)(sum(s where group[s]=g)(1) >= min_group_size)
forall(g in groups)(sum(s where group[s]=g)(1) <= max_group_size)
group_imbalance = max(g1,g2 in groups)(abs(sum(s where group[s]=g1)(1) - sum(s where group[s]=g2)(1)))
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..num_groups: group[1..num_students]"],"constraints":["forall(g in groups)(sum(s where group[s]=g)(1) >= min_group_size)","forall(g in groups)(sum(s where group[s]=g)(1) <= max_group_size)","group_imbalance = max(g1,g2 in groups)(abs(sum(s where group[s]=g1)(1) - sum(s where group[s]=g2)(1)))"]}

context: forall(t in timeslots)(alldifferent([room[c] | c where timeslot[c]=t]))
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..num_rooms: room[1..num_classes]"],"constraints":["forall(c in classes)(capacity[room[c]] >= class_size[c])","forall(t in timeslots)(alldifferent([room[c] | c where timeslot[c]=t]))","forall(c in classes)(room[c] in compatible_rooms[c])"]}

context: forall(s in semesters)(sum(c where semester[c]=s)(credits[c]) <= max_credits)
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..num_semesters: semester[1..num_courses]"],"constraints":["forall((c1,c2) in prerequisites)(semester[c1] < semester[c2])","forall(s in semesters)(sum(c where semester[c]=s)(credits[c]) <= max_credits)","total_penalty = sum(c)(abs(semester[c] - ideal_semester[c]))"]}

context: forall(r in rotations, l in labs)(sum(s where lab_assign[s,r]=l)(1) <= lab_capacity[l])
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..num_labs: lab_assign[1..num_students, 1..num_rotations]"],"constraints":["forall(s in students)(alldifferent(lab_assign[s, ..]))","forall(r in rotations, l in labs)(sum(s where lab_assign[s,r]=l)(1) <= lab_capacity[l])"]}

context: forall(t in teams)(sum(s where team[s]=t)(1) >= 3 /\ sum(s where team[s]=t)(1) <= 5)
team_diversity = min(t in teams)(card({skill[s] | s where team[s]=t}))
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..num_teams: team[1..num_students]"],"constraints":["forall(t in teams)(sum(s where team[s]=t)(1) >= 3 /\\ sum(s where team[s]=t)(1) <= 5)","forall(s1,s2 where conflict[s1,s2])(team[s1] != team[s2])","team_diversity = min(t in teams)(card({skill[s] | s where team[s]=t}))"]}

context: forall(c in customers)(sum(s in sites where covers(s,c))(build[s]) >= 1)
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 0..1: build[1..num_candidate_sites]"],"constraints":["forall(c in customers)(sum(s in sites where covers(s,c))(build[s]) >= 1)","num_towers = sum(build)"]}

context: forall(t1,t2 in towers where interferes(t1,t2))(abs(freq[t1]-freq[t2]) >= min_gap)
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..max_freq: freq[1..num_towers]"],"constraints":["forall(t1,t2 in towers where interferes(t1,t2))(abs(freq[t1]-freq[t2]) >= min_gap)","max_frequency = max(freq)"]}

context: forall(l in links)(sum(s in slices)(bandwidth[s,l]) <= link_capacity[l])
forall(s in slices)(sum(l in paths[s])(bandwidth[s,l]) >= min_bw[s])
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 0..max_bw: bandwidth[1..num_slices, 1..num_links]"],"constraints":["forall(l in links)(sum(s in slices)(bandwidth[s,l]) <= link_capacity[l])","forall(s in slices)(sum(l in paths[s])(bandwidth[s,l]) >= min_bw[s])","total_throughput = sum(s)(sum(l)(bandwidth[s,l]) * priority[s])"]}

context: forall(r in racks)(sum(s where server_rack[s]=r)(heat[s]) <= max_heat[r])
forall(r in racks)(sum(s where server_rack[s]=r)(1) <= rack_slots[r])
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..num_racks: server_rack[1..num_servers]"],"constraints":["forall(r in racks)(sum(s where server_rack[s]=r)(heat[s]) <= max_heat[r])","forall(r in racks)(sum(s where server_rack[s]=r)(1) <= rack_slots[r])","cooling_cost = sum(r)(cooling_rate[r] * sum(s where server_rack[s]=r)(heat[s]))"]}

context: forall(u1,u2 in users where u1<u2, c in channels)(allocate[u1,c]+allocate[u2,c] <= 1 \/ not_interfere[u1,u2])
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 0..1: allocate[1..num_users, 1..num_channels]"],"constraints":["forall(c in channels)(sum(u in users)(allocate[u,c]) <= 1)","forall(u1,u2 in users where u1<u2, c in channels)(allocate[u1,c]+allocate[u2,c] <= 1 \\/ not_interfere[u1,u2])","total_utility = sum(u,c)(allocate[u,c] * utility[u,c])"]}

context: forall(f in fields, s in 2..num_seasons)(plant[f,s] != plant[f,s-1])
forall(f in fields, s in seasons)(plant[f,s] in suitable_crops[f])
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..num_crops: plant[1..num_fields, 1..num_seasons]"],"constraints":["forall(f in fields, s in 2..num_seasons)(plant[f,s] != plant[f,s-1])","forall(f in fields, s in seasons)(plant[f,s] in suitable_crops[f])","total_yield = sum(f,s)(yield_rate[plant[f,s], f, s])"]}

context: forall(z in zones, t in periods)(soil_moisture[z,t] >= min_moisture[z])
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 0..max_water: irrigate[1..num_zones, 1..num_periods]"],"constraints":["forall(z in zones, t in periods)(soil_moisture[z,t] >= min_moisture[z])","forall(t in periods)(sum(z)(irrigate[z,t]) <= pump_capacity)","water_usage = sum(z,t)(irrigate[z,t])"]}

context: forall(d in days)(sum(p where harvest_day[p]=d)(area[p]) <= daily_capacity)
total_loss = sum(p)(if harvest_day[p] > optimal_day[p] then (harvest_day[p]-optimal_day[p])*loss_rate[p] else 0 endif)
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 1..num_days: harvest_day[1..num_plots]"],"constraints":["forall(d in days)(sum(p where harvest_day[p]=d)(area[p]) <= daily_capacity)","total_loss = sum(p)(if harvest_day[p] > optimal_day[p] then (harvest_day[p]-optimal_day[p])*loss_rate[p] else 0 endif)"]}

{"variables":["var 0.0..max_amount: amount[1..num_fertilizers]"],"constraints":["forall(n in nutrients)(sum(f)(amount[f]*nutrient_content[f,n]) >= min_nutrient[n])","forall(n in nutrients)(sum(f)(amount[f]*nutrient_content[f,n]) <= max_nutrient[n])","fertilizer_cost = sum(f)(amount[f]*price[f])"]}

context: forall(t in periods)(temperature[t] >= min_temp /\ temperature[t] <= max_temp)
forall(t in periods)(humidity[t] >= min_humid /\ humidity[t] <= max_humid)
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 0..max_heat: heating[1..num_periods]","var 0..max_vent: ventilation[1..num_periods]"],"constraints":["forall(t in periods)(temperature[t] >= min_temp /\\ temperature[t] <= max_temp)","forall(t in periods)(humidity[t] >= min_humid /\\ humidity[t] <= max_humid)","energy_cost = sum(t)(heating[t]*heat_price + ventilation[t]*vent_price)"]}

context: forall(j in jobs, t in required_tools[j])(loaded[t,j] = 1)
forall(j in jobs)(sum(t in tools)(loaded[t,j]) <= magazine_capacity)
tool_changes = sum(j in 2..num_jobs, t in tools)(abs(loaded[t,j]-loaded[t,j-1]))
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 0..1: loaded[1..num_tools, 1..num_jobs]"],"constraints":["forall(j in jobs, t in required_tools[j])(loaded[t,j] = 1)","forall(j in jobs)(sum(t in tools)(loaded[t,j]) <= magazine_capacity)","tool_changes = sum(j in 2..num_jobs, t in tools)(abs(loaded[t,j]-loaded[t,j-1]))"]}

{"variables":["var 1..num_feeders: feeder[1..num_components]","var 1..num_nozzles: nozzle[1..num_components]"],"constraints":["forall(c in components)(feeder[c] in compatible_feeders[c])","forall(c in components)(nozzle[c] in compatible_nozzles[c])","cycle_time = max(placement_time)"]}
{"variables":["var 0..max_cuts: cut[1..num_patterns]"],"constraints":["forall(w in widths)(sum(p)(pattern[p,w]*cut[p]) >= demand[w])","waste = sum(p)(cut[p]*waste_per_pattern[p])"]}

context: forall(b in batches, p in properties)(sum(i)(proportion[b,i]*prop_val[i,p]) >= min_spec[p])
forall(b in batches, p in properties)(sum(i)(proportion[b,i]*prop_val[i,p]) <= max_spec[p])
tactic_proof: {"variables":["var 0.0..max_batch: batch_size[1..num_batches]","var 0.0..1.0: proportion[1..num_batches, 1..num_ingredients]"],"constraints":["forall(b in batches)(sum(i)(proportion[b,i]) = 1.0)","forall(b in batches, p in properties)(sum(i)(proportion[b,i]*prop_val[i,p]) >= min_spec[p])","forall(b in batches, p in properties)(sum(i)(proportion[b,i]*prop_val[i,p]) <= max_spec[p])"]}

{"variables":["var 0..1: inspect[1..num_stations, 1..num_products]"],"constraints":["forall(p in products)(sum(s)(inspect[s,p]) >= min_inspections[p])","forall(s in stations)(sum(p)(inspect[s,p]*inspect_time[s]) <= station_time_budget[s])","inspection_cost = sum(s,p)(inspect[s,p]*cost_per_inspection[s])"]}
